entities.name: onboarding_invites
entities.tenantIsolation: tenant_id required; contact and invitation hashes are tenant-scoped
entities.crudLevelDeclared: create/read/accept/revoke invitations by tenant_id and hashed challenge in D1

entities.name: onboarding_first_access_sessions
entities.tenantIsolation: tenant_id plus invite_id foreign key; first access session hashes are tenant-scoped
entities.crudLevelDeclared: create/read/update first access lifecycle by tenant_id, session hash, expiration and revocation in D1

entities.name: onboarding_contact_confirmations
entities.tenantIsolation: tenant_id plus invite/session references; confirmation hashes and attempts are tenant-scoped
entities.crudLevelDeclared: create/read/confirm contact ownership by tenant_id and hashed challenge in D1

entities.name: onboarding_recovery_requests
entities.tenantIsolation: tenant_id plus contact hash and optional identity_ref; recovery hashes are tenant-scoped
entities.crudLevelDeclared: create/read/verify/complete/revoke recovery lifecycle by tenant_id and hashed challenge in D1

entities.name: onboarding_lifecycle_events
entities.tenantIsolation: tenant_id required on every audit row and linked to invite, first access, confirmation or recovery records
entities.crudLevelDeclared: append/read audit events by tenant_id and occurred_at in D1

securityControls: Raw invitation, first-access, confirmation and recovery challenges are never persisted; only hash columns are allowed.
All operational tables require tenant_id and tenant-scoped indexes for acceptance-relevant reads.
Expirable challenges require expires_at and revocable flows require revoked_at or terminal lifecycle status.
Audit rows capture actor_ref, reason and occurred_at without storing secrets or raw personal contact values.
Frontend and microfrontend never access D1 directly; backend/BFF must enforce this contract over Workers bindings.
acceptanceEvidenceRequired: GitHub Actions PR gate green after scheduler publishes the diff.
Cloudflare D1-backed migration execution for migrations/0001_onboarding_acesso_d1.sql.
Cloudflare D1-backed fixture execution proving tenant isolation, expiration, revocation and no cross-tenant recovery lookup.
Rollback execution or equivalent remote D1 evidence for rollbacks/0001_onboarding_acesso_d1.sql.
